siteData.address: Outer Ring Rd, Hudkeshwar, Nagpur, Maharashtra 440037
siteData.heroSub: Where Every Celebration Becomes a Timeless Memory
siteData.aboutP1: Nestled on the Outer Ring Road, Hudkeshwar, Krishnam Lawns & Banquets has been Nagpur's premier destination for weddings, receptions, and grand events. We blend timeless elegance with modern luxury to create unforgettable moments.
siteData.aboutP2: Our sprawling venue and dedicated team ensure every detail — from décor to cuisine — is curated with perfection, making your special day truly extraordinary.

reviews.name: Rajesh Sharma
reviews.text: Krishnam Lawns transformed our daughter's wedding into a fairy tale. The décor, the food, and the hospitality were simply beyond our expectations. Every guest was amazed!

reviews.name: Sunita & Anil Deshmukh
reviews.text: We hosted our silver anniversary here and it was an evening we'll cherish forever. The staff went above and beyond. The open lawn at night was absolutely magical!

reviews.name: Priya Mehta
reviews.text: Our company's annual gala at Krishnam was a massive success. Professional setup, excellent catering, and the banquet hall looked stunning. Highly recommend!
